title: DOE Issues Export Approval to Golden Pass LNG, Accelerating President Trumpâ€™s Pledge to Restore American Energy Dominance
content: U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright approved an LNG export permit extension for Golden Pass LNG Terminal in Texas, supporting President Trumpâ€™s push for American energy dominance. This approval allows more time for the terminal, co-owned by QatarEnergy and ExxonMobil, to begin exports later this year. Once operational, Golden Pass will be the ninth large-scale U.S. LNG export terminal, with a capacity of 2.57 Bcf/d, further strengthening U.S. energy leadership and boosting national security.
author: Analysts Account
